.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(24, 24, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(245, 224, 220, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-tab-header-container.background: rgb(17, 17, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
